DEFT'S PC1538,5 MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE FILED

/CAL:BIFURCATED PRELIMINARY HEARING #2 & MTS/MO DENIED/INTC/X:TWO CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETERS EUNJI AVERILL AND LAURA VILLANUEVA INTERPRETING FOR5 CO-DEFENDANTS/X:ALL PARTIES PRESENT AT 0916, CROSS EXAMINATION OF OFFICER WILLIAM PALLADINO RESUMES BY KWIXUAN MALOOF DPD, MICHAEL WHELAN/X:NO RE-DIRECT/X:DEFENSE EXHIBITS CALLED OUT OF ORDER/EXHM:DEFENSE H:PHOTO OF UNITED NATIONS PLAZA IN RELATION TO BART STATION/EXHM:DEFENSE I:PHOTO OF UNITEDNATIONS PLAZA, WEST BOUND VIEW/WIT SWORN DA:DANIEL SOLORZANO, SAN FRANCISCO POLICE OFFICER/X:COURT INSTRUCTS THE PEOPLE TO GET COPIES OF WARRANTS AND PHOTOGRAPHS/X:COURT RECESS AT 0944/X:COURT RESUMES AT 0955/X:ERICA CORNSSPECIALLY APPEARED FOR SUPRIYA PERRY/DEFT WV CPX/X:COURT RESUMES AT 1124,ALL PARTIES PRESENT,/X:INFORMATION HAS BEEN PROVIDED TO ALL  DEFENSE COUNSEL BY THE PEOPLE AND IS TO BE USED ONLY FOR THIS HEARING/X:DIRECT EXAMINATION OF OFFICER SOLORZANO RESUMES/X:CROSS EXAMINATION BY DEFENSE COUNSEL PETER FURST, MALCOLM SMITH, GARY PRENETA/DEFT WV CPX/DOP/X:PRELIMINARY HEARINGRESUMES AT 1334, CROSS EXAMINATION OF OFFICER SOLORZANO CONTINUES BY GARY PRENETA, KWIXUAN MALOOF, MICHAEL WHELAN, MALCOM SMITH/X:NO RE-DIRECT/EXHMA:DEFENSE J:PHOTOS, 10 PAGES/X:NO DEFENSE WITNESSES/X:DEFENSE EXHIBITS A, B,C, G, H, I, AND J ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE/X:DEFENSE EXHIBITS D, E, AND F ARE RETURNED BACK TO DEFENSE COUNSEL/X:MOTION TO SUPPRESS DENIED AS TO 16001147 ARTEAGA, 16001150 ENAMORADO, AND 16001158 CRUZ/X:EXHIBITS MARKED ANDADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, ARE ORDERED RETURNED/X:TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/871D:1, 2, 3, 4/

/CAL:BIFURCATED PRELIMINARY HEARING AND MTS/X:SECOND CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER LAURA VILLANUEVA REPLACED EUNJI AVERILL AT 1440/X:AT 1515 AFTER BREAK EUNJI AVERILL RESUMES INTERPRETING/X:AT 1538 LAURA VILLANUEVA INTERPRETS/X:AT 1604 EUNJI AVERILL INTERPRETS/X:ALL PARTIES PRESENT AT 1416, TWO CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETERS ARE INTERPRETING FOR FIVE CO-DEFENDANTS,/X:DIRECT EXAMINATION OF JULIO BANDONI SAN FRANCSICO POLICE OFFICER RESUMES/EXHMA:PEOPLES 1:8 X 11 COLOR PHOTO OF VARIOUS ITEMS, MONEY, CELL PHONES WHICHARE TAGGED/X:CROSS EXAMINATION BY DEFENSE ATTORNEYS GARY PRENETA, KWIXUANMALOOF, MALCOLM SMITH, PETER FURST, NONE BY MICHAEL WHELAN/EXHM:DEFENSE B:PHOTO FROM TOP OF STAIRWAY VIEWING UPWARD AND DOWNWARD ESCALATORS/X:RE-DIRECT EXAMINATION/X:NO RE-CROSS/EXHM:DEFENSE C:PHOTO OF WOMAN WALKING DOWN STEPS BETWEEN UPWARD AND DOWNWARD ESCALATORS/X:DEFENSE EXHIBITS WERE CALLEDOUT OF ORDER/EXHM:DEFENSE G:PHOTO OF UNITED NATIONS PLAZA/EXHMA:PEOPLES 2:PHOTO DEPICTING AMOUNTS OF MONEY/X:COURT BREAK, COURT RESUMES AT 1315 WITH ALL PARTIES PRESENT,/X:THE PEOPLE RECALL OFFICER JARED HARRIS FOR DIRECTEXAMINATION/X:CROSS EXAMINATION BY DEFENSE COUNSEL GARY PRENETA, KWIXUAN MALOOF, MICHAEL WHELAN, PETER FURST/X:NO RE-DIRECT/WIT SWORN DA:WILLIAM PALLADIL, SAN FRANCISCO POLICE OFFICER/X:COURT BREAK AT 1608,/X:DIRECT EXAMINATION RESUMES AT 1610/X:CROSS EXAMINATION BY DEFENSE GARY PRENETA, KWIXUANMALOOF /DEFT WV CPX/CONTD:BIFURCATED PRELIMINARY HEARING #2/DOP
